name: SetVideoOfflineSource
title: SetVideoOfflineSource
syntax: SetVideoOfflineSource(char windowName[], long sourceType, char sourcePath[]);
description: Sets the offline source (type and path) for a CANoeVideo Window.

parameters.name: windowName
parameters.description: The name of the Video Window.

parameters.name: sourceType
parameters.description: The type of offline source: 0|cNoVideoInput 1|cVideoFile 2|cImageFolder For details see the Offline Source in the CANoeVideo Configuration dialog.

parameters.name: sourcePath
parameters.description: The corresponding source path: For cNoVideoInput the path will be ignored. For cVideoFile this must be a existing video file. For cImageFolder this must be a existing folder.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
